name: eidos-storemetheus
description: Build governed Codex plugin stores for companies that need trusted AI operating layers.

interface.longDescription: Eidos Storemetheus helps Codex design and build private or public plugin stores for organizations. It treats a plugin store as a governed trust surface: scoped plugins, manifests, review gates, install proof, cache/config visibility, operating cadence, and owner accountability.
defaultPrompt: Design a governed plugin store for this company.
Audit this plugin store before I share it.
Create the first plugin-store operating model.
